title: Supply Chain Manager - RITES - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - RITES - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the RITES family as a Supply Chain Manager in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About RITES:
RITES is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RITES!
